infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Hey Auto Driver needs your location to show your position and accept ride requests.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Hey Auto Driver tracks your location while you are online to match you with nearby riders.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Hey Auto Driver needs your location to accept ride requests.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Hey Auto Driver tracks your location while you are online.
